causalAutopsy.notes: The rollout driver, signed result store, and StageAdvancer had been merged, but boot never constructed or invoked the driver, leaving promotion permanently inert while demotion alone was live.

guardEvidence.howCaught: Auto-climb is floored at one tick per minute, each tick can write at most one adjacent stage, and the finite promotion ceiling makes stage mutations settle to zero; off and operator schedule no autonomous promotion.
